hero.title: Stories worth keeping alive.
hero.subtitle: Your membership funds deep reporting, cultural memory, and independent voices — from Palestine to Bali and beyond.

desc.reader: The lowest rate possible for the fragmented media landscape of our time. Open for a founding 1,000 readers.
desc.subscriber: Our suggested subscription rate. Access to everything we publish + lots of great discounts at bookshops and independent publishers around the world.
desc.bookshelf: For the reader who wants to take things offline with our carefully curated selection of the best new books published on Palestine.
desc.supporter: For the reader who wants full access to the extended universe.
desc.collector: For those who need a complete bookshelf of new writing on Palestine: we'll carefully curate and mail you a physical book every month so you never miss a title.
desc.patron: For those able to support our work at an infrastructural level.

features.podcast: The Trace of the Tide Podcast direct to your inbox
features.newsletter: The Trace of the Tide Weekly cultural newsletter
features.shop_discount: 10% off at the Trace of the Tide shop
features.partner_discount: 10% off at partner bookshops & publishers around the world
features.tote_or_pin: A classic Trace of the Tide tote bag or enamel supporter pin
features.ttt_bookshelf: The Trace of the Tide Bookshelf: 6 physical books per year
features.early_bird_tickets: Early bird tickets for live events
features.zoom_invitations: Invitations to live Zoom conversations with authors about key pieces
features.physical_books_12: 12 physical books per year (1 per month) + bespoke extras
features.masthead_listing: Public thanks & listing on our masthead

faq.title: Common questions
faq.a1: Yes — cancel from your account settings at any time, no questions asked.
faq.a2: All major credit and debit cards via Stripe. Payments are encrypted and secure.
faq.a3: Yes — upgrade or downgrade at any time from your subscription settings.
faq.a4: Yes — use the "Gift a trace" option in the navigation to give a membership.
